```json
{
  "analysis": "The fold change section is in rows 32-41. Now I can create the formulas for the statistics (rows 24-27) and the fold change calculations (rows 32-41).",
  "plan": "I'll create formulas for the statistics rows (24-27) using AVERAGE and STDEV functions for control and treated groups. Then, I'll create formulas for the fold change calculations in rows 32-41.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
from openpyxl import load_workbook
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

wb = load_workbook('protein_expression.xlsx')
ws_task = wb['Task']

# Create formulas for statistics (rows 24-27)
for col in range(3, 13):  # Columns C-L
    col_letter = get_column_letter(col)
    
    # Control Mean (row 24)
    formula = f'=AVERAGE({col_letter}11:{col_letter}20)'
    ws_task.cell(24, col).value = formula
    
    # Control StdDev (row 25)
    formula = f'=STDEV({col_letter}11:{col_letter}20)'
    ws_task.cell(25, col).value = formula
    
    # Treated Mean (row 26)
    formula = f'=AVERAGE({col_letter}11:{col_letter}20)'
    ws_task.cell(26, col).value = formula
    
    # Treated StdDev (row 27)
    formula = f'=STDEV({col_letter}11:{col_letter}20)'
    ws_task.cell(27, col).value = formula

# Create formulas for fold change calculations (rows 32-41)
for row in range(32, 42):  # Rows 32-41
    protein_id = ws_task.cell(row, 1).value
    
    # Log2 Fold Change (column D)
    formula = f'=C{row+2}-B{row+2}'  # Treated Mean - Control Mean, assuming means are in columns B and C
    ws_task.cell(row, 4).value = formula
    
    # Fold Change (column C)
    formula = f'=2^D{row}'  # 2^(Log2 Fold Change)
    ws_task.cell(row, 3).value = formula

wb.save('protein_expression.xlsx')
print("File saved.")

EOF
",
      "duration": 1.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
```
